goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: The semantic grocery locator works and both runs prove the 50 g shortage and provenance. Both then fail because the test tries to blur via a Week of heading absent on the shopping-list page, so the real PATCH path is not triggered.
deviations: Used fixed-path cleanup for authorized mirror outputs.
remaining_blockers: Remaining workflow/axe/screenshots, disposable DB, and diff gates
goalbuddy_receipt_v1.stopped_because: Two fresh runs failed at the same nonexistent blur target.
